name: linkedin-post-writer
description: Claude Code plugin that auto-converts blog posts into algorithm-optimized LinkedIn posts. v0.7.0: orchestrator honors optional input.format_preference ('text'|'carousel') — overrides Step 1 format heuristic so the backend's format-mix governor can bias dispatch (carousel target ratio 0.8 for IG/TT/Threads fan-out). v0.6.0: explicit English-only authoring directive for post_text + optional caption_language envelope flag for backend telemetry. v0.5.0 BREAKING: text-only authoring; carousel format short-circuits to status=route_to_carousel_gen so the universal /carousel-gen engine (in ai-image-carousel-prompt-gen plugin) handles slide + image-prompt generation. Backend assembles the carousel via CarouselGenOutputAdapter.
author: Ali Sadikin <ali.sadikincom85@gmail.com>
